Iran has targeted US bases across the Gulf region, while American forces have launched attacks on Iranian command centers and infrastructure to weaken their military capabilities. President Trump has warned Iran to return to negotiations or face further consequences, while the vital Strait of Hormuz remains closed.
amharic: ኢራንና አሜሪካ እያደረጉት ባለው ወታደራዊ ጥቃት በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ውጥረት እያየለ መጥቷል። ኢራን በባህረ ሰላጤው አካባቢ በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያዎች ላይ ጥቃት የሰነዘረች ሲሆን፣ አሜሪካ በበኩሏ የኢራንን ወታደራዊ አቅም ለማዳከም ያነጣጠረ እርምጃ ወስዳለች። ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ኢራን ወደ ድርድር ካልተመለሰች ተጨማሪ እርምጃ እንደሚወሰድ አስጠንቅቀዋል፤ ይህ በእንዲህ እንዳለም አስፈላጊው የሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የባህር መስመር ተዘግቶ ይገኛል።
oromo: Iraanii fi Ameerikaan wal-waraanatti deebi'uun isaanii waldhabdee biyyoota lamaanii hammaachisee jira. Iraan buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa naannawa Gulf jiran irratti haleellaa kan raawwatte yoo ta'u, Ameerikaanis aangoofi humna waraana Iraan laaffisuuf jecha bakkeewwan adda addaa haleeltee jirti. Pirezidaanti Traamp, Iraan mariitti hin deebitu taanaan tarkaanfiin cimaan akka fudhatamu akeekkachiisaniiru; haalli kun immoo daandii galaana Hormuz akka cufamu taasiseera.

title: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
english: FIFA is considering disciplinary action against Argentina's national football team following their display of a banner claiming sovereignty over the Falkland Islands after a victory against England. This political gesture during a World Cup match violates official sporting regulations regarding team conduct. The dispute stems from historical tensions between the two nations, and this incident mirrors a similar controversy from 2014 that resulted in a financial penalty for the Argentine Football Association.
amharic: ፊፋ በእንግሊዝ ላይ ካሸነፉ በኋላ ስለ ፋክላንድ ደሴቶች ባለቤትነት የሚገልጽ ባነር በማሳየታቸው በአርጀንቲና ብሔራዊ ቡድን ላይ የእርምት እርምጃ ለመውሰድ እያሰበ ነው። በዓለም ዋንጫ ጨዋታ ወቅት የታየው ይህ የፖለቲካ መልዕክት ከስፖርት ህግ ውጭ በመሆኑ ቅጣት ሊያስከትል ይችላል። ጉዳዩ በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ካለው የቆየ የድንበር ውዝግብ ጋር የተያያዘ ሲሆን፣ አርጀንቲና ተመሳሳይ ድርጊት በ2014 በመፈጸሟ የገንዘብ ቅጣት ተላልፎባት ነበር።
oromo: FIFA garee kubbaa miillaa Arjantiiyinaa irratti tarkaanfii adabbii fudhachuu mala; kunis ergaa Ingilizii injifatan booda waa'ee abbaa irrummaa oddoloota Faalklaandi ibsu agarsiisuun isaanii hordofee dha. Gochi siyaasaa tapha Waancaa Addunyaa irratti raawwatame kun seera ispoortii kan cabsu ta'uu FIFA ibseera. Walitti bu'iinsi kun biyyoota lamaan gidduutti seenaa dheeraa kan qabu yoo ta'u, Arjantiiyiniin waggaa 2014tti gocha wal fakkaataa raawwachuun ishee adabbii maallaqaa akka itti murtaa'u taasiseera.

title: Families of 43 victims await verdict in Genoa bridge disaster
english: A verdict is expected in the long-running trial concerning the 2018 collapse of the Morandi bridge in Genoa, which tragically killed 43 people. For years, families have sought accountability while prosecutors argued that maintenance was neglected to prioritize corporate profits. Defense teams have countered that an original design flaw was the primary cause of the structure's failure.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ በ2018 በጄኖዋ የሞራንዲ ድልድይ መፍረስ ምክንያት ለሞቱት 43 ሰዎች የፍርድ ውሳኔ በቅርቡ ይጠበቃል። ለዓመታት የሟች ቤተሰቦች ለደረሰው አደጋ ተጠያቂነትን ሲጠይቁ የቆዩ ሲሆን፣ አቃቤ ህግም የድልድዩ ጥገና ለትርፍ ሲባል ችላ እንደተባለ ይከራከራሉ። በሌላ በኩል የተከሳሾቹ ጠበቆች የድልድዩ መፍረስ ዋና ምክንያት በግንባታው ላይ የነበረው የንድፍ ጉድለት መሆኑን በመጥቀስ ይከራከራሉ።
oromo: Murtii dhaddacha kessatti bara 2018 kufuudhaan lubbuu namoota 43 galaafate darajaa Morandi kan magaalaa Jenoowa irratti ergaa dheeraa booda eegamaa jira. Maatiin midhaan irra gahe waggoota dheeraaf gaaffii itti gaafatamummaa kaasaa turan; gama biraatiin, qorattoonni himatamaa turan bu'aa dhaabbilee daldalaaf jecha suphuu irraanfatanii akka turan eeru. Gama biraatiin, abukaatonni himatamtootaa sababni guddaan kufuudha sanaa hanqina diizaayinii durii akka ta'e falmaachaa jiru.

title: US military to start screening for testosterone deficiency, Hegseth says
english: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has introduced a new policy requiring all active-duty and reserve military personnel aged 30 and older to be screened for testosterone deficiency during their annual health checkups. Soldiers diagnosed with low levels can choose to receive hormone replacement therapy to support their physical health and long-term well-being. While supporters claim this ensures a stronger force, some critics argue the initiative is an unnecessary focus on cultural issues rather than essential medical needs.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መከላከያ ሚኒስትር ፒት ሄግሴት በጦር ኃይሉ ውስጥ ዕድሜያቸው 30 እና ከዚያ በላይ የሆኑ ወታደሮች ዓመታዊ የጤና ምርመራ ሲያደርጉ ለቴስቶስትሮን እጥረትም እንዲመረመሩ አዲስ ሕግ አውጥተዋል። ዝቅተኛ የሆርሞን መጠን ያላቸው ወታደሮች በፈቃደኝነት የሕክምና ድጋፍ ማግኘት የሚችሉ ሲሆን፣ ይህም የአካላዊ ብቃታቸውንና የረጅም ጊዜ ጤንነታቸውን ለመጠበቅ ያለመ መሆኑ ተገልጿል። ሆኖም ይህ ውሳኔ አስፈላጊ የሕክምና አገልግሎት ነው ወይስ በባህል ላይ ያተኮረ አላስፈላጊ ጉዳይ የሚለው ክርክር አስነስቷል።
oromo: Ministirri ittisa biyyaa Ameerikaa Piit Heegseth, miseensonni waraanaa umuriin isaanii 30 fi sanaa ol ta'e hundi qormaata fayyaa waggaa isaanii irratti dhabamuu hoormoonii 'testosterone'f akka qoraman labsaniiru. Duulli kun loltoonni qaama isaanii fi fayyaa isaanii cimaa akka ta'uuf yaadamee kan diriirfame yoo ta'u, namoonni dhibee kana qaban wal'aansa hoormoonii fedhiin akka argatan ni taasifama. Haata'u malee, tarkaanfiin kun haala fayyaa waraanaa fooyyessuuf kan gargaaru ykn dhimma aadaa irratti xiyyeeffate kan jedhu mormii fi yaada garaagaraa kaasuu danda'eera.

title: Actor Sam Neill died from pneumonia, agent confirms
english: Renowned New Zealand actor Sam Neill, famous for his iconic roles in Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, has passed away at the age of 78 due to pneumonia. While he had previously battled blood cancer, his representatives confirmed he was cancer-free at the time of his death. His family plans to hold a private memorial service on his farm in New Zealand to celebrate his life and extensive acting career.
amharic: በጁራሲክ ፓርክ እና በፒኪ ብላይንደርስ ፊልሞች የሚታወቀው የኒውዚላንድ ተዋናይ ሳም ኒል በ78 ዓመቱ በሳምባ ምች ህመም ምክንያት ህይወቱ አልፏል። ከዚህ ቀደም በደም ካንሰር ሲሰቃይ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ በሞተበት ወቅት ከካንሰር ነጻ እንደነበር ተወካዮቹ አረጋግጠዋል። ቤተሰቦቹም በኒውዚላንድ በሚገኘው እርሻው ላይ የግል የቀብር ስነ-ስርዓት እንደሚያደርጉለት ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Aartistii beekamaa biyya Niwuu Ziilaand kan ta’e Sam Niil, filmiiwwan Jurassic Park fi Peaky Blinders keessatti qooda fudhate, umrii waggaa 78tti dhukkuba sombaatiin du’eera. Kana dura dhukkuba kaansarii dhiigaatiin qabamee kan ture ta’us, yeroo du’etti kaansarii irraa fayyee akka ture bakka buutonni isaa mirkaneessaniiru. Maatiin isaa sirna awwaalchaa dhuunfaa qabeenya isaa kan Niwuu Ziilaand keessatti argamuutti raawwachuuf karoorfataniiru.

title: FIFA World Cup final: Date, time, halftime show, prediction and Trump
english: The 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina is scheduled for Sunday, July 19, at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. The event will feature a unique halftime show with global music stars and a closing ceremony, with US President Donald Trump expected to present the trophy to the winner. Statistics indicate that Spain is the favorite to secure the victory during regulation time.
amharic: የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና መካከል እሁድ ሐምሌ 19 ቀን በኒው ጀርሲ ሜትላይፍ ስታዲየም ይካሄዳል። ውድድሩ ታዋቂ የሙዚቃ ኮከቦች የሚሳተፉበት አዝናኝ የእረፍት ጊዜ ፕሮግራም እና የመዝጊያ ስነ-ስርዓት ይኖረዋል። የአሜሪካው ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ለአሸናፊው ቡድን ዋንጫውን እንደሚያስረክቡ ይጠበቃል፤ ስፔን ጨዋታውን በሰዓቱ የማሸነፍ እድል ሰፊ እንደሆነም ተገምቷል።
oromo: Qophiin xumura tapha waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 kan Ispeen fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti godhamu Dilbata Adoolessa 19, dirree MetLife Stadium, Niiw Jarseyitti gaggeeffama. Taphi kun qophii bashannansiisaa fi sirna xumuraa kan taphattoota beekamoo of keessatti qabatu ta'a. Pireezidaantiin Ameerikaa Doonaald Tiraamp injifattootaaf waancaa kan kennan yoo ta'u, qorannoon statistiksii akka agarsiisutti Ispeen injifachuu dandeessi jedhamee eegama.

title: Why Italy’s Genoa bridge collapse led to one of its biggest criminal trials
english: In 2018, the Morandi bridge in Genoa, Italy, collapsed during a storm, resulting in the tragic deaths of 43 people. Legal proceedings are currently underway to hold those responsible accountable for the disaster, which investigators linked to long-term maintenance neglect and structural corrosion. Families of the victims are hopeful that this significant criminal trial will finally provide justice for the preventable loss of life.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ. በ2018 በጣሊያን ጄኖዋ ከተማ የሞራንዲ ድልድይ በከባድ ዝናብ ምክንያት በመፍረሱ 43 ሰዎች ህይወታቸውን አጥተዋል። አደጋው የደረሰው ለረጅም ጊዜ በቂ ጥገና ባለመደረጉ እና የብረት ክፍሎቹ በመበላሸታቸው እንደሆነ ምርመራዎች ያመለክታሉ። አሁን እየተካሄደ ያለው ትልቅ የወንጀል ችሎት ለሟቾች ቤተሰቦች ፍትህን ለማምጣት ያለመ ሲሆን፣ በግድየለሽነት ለደረሰው ጉዳት ተጠያቂዎችን ለመቅጣት እየሰራ ነው።
oromo: Bara 2018 biyya Xaaliyaanii magaalaa Genoa keessatti, daandiin riqicha Morandi jedhamu erga diigamee booda lubbuun namoota 43 darbeera. Qorannoon akka agarsiisutti, balaan kun kan uumame gartuun kun yeroo dheeraaf suphaa barbaachisu waan hin argatiniif fi sibiiltonni isaa waan dhumanifi. Yeroo ammaa kana abbaan alangaa namoota balaa kanaaf itti gaafatamtoota ta'an irratti seeraan tarkaanfii fudhachuuf qormaata guddaa taasisaa jiru; kunis maatii miidhamtootaaf haqni akka argamuuf kan gargaaruudha.

title: Vance says Epstein had connections to US, Israeli intelligence
english: US Vice President JD Vance recently stated that the late Jeffrey Epstein maintained high-level connections with both American and Israeli intelligence agencies. During a podcast interview, Vance claimed these Israeli ties appeared to be linked to left-leaning elements of the nation’s political establishment. Additionally, Vance admitted that the Trump administration failed to manage public transparency effectively regarding the release of Epstein-related documents.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ምክትል ፕሬዝዳንት ጄዲ ቫንስ፣ ጄፍሪ ኤፕስታይን ከአሜሪካ እና ከእስራኤል የስለላ ተቋማት ጋር ከፍተኛ ግንኙነት እንደነበረው ገለጹ። በቃለ-መጠይቃቸውም፣ እነዚህ የእስራኤል ግንኙነቶች ከሀገሪቱ የፖለቲካ ግራ ዘመም ክፍሎች ጋር የተሳሰሩ እንደሆኑ ተናግረዋል። በተጨማሪም ቫንስ፣ የትራምፕ አስተዳደር ከኤፕስታይን ሰነዶች ጋር በተያያዘ ግልጽነትን ለማስፈን እና መረጃዎችን ለማስተላለፍ በኩል ክፍተት እንደነበረባቸው አምነዋል።
oromo: Itti aanaa pirezidantii Amerikaa JD Vance akka jedhanitti, Jeffrey Epstein qaamolee basaasaa Amerikaa fi Israa'elii wajjin hariiroo cimaa qaba ture. Gaafii fi deebii taasise kanaan, hariiroon Epstein Israa'elii wajjin qabu gara bitaatti kan goruu fi siyaasa biyyattii wajjin kan walqabatu akka ta'e ibseera. Kana malees, Vance bulchiinsi Trump ragaalee Epstein ilaalchisee iftoomina uumuu fi odeeffannoo sirriitti dabarsuu irratti hanqina akka qabaatan amaneera.

title: US releases video of strikes on Iran
english: The United States military has made public footage of recent airstrikes conducted against targets within Iran. These attacks focused on missile facilities and coastal defense technology located near the Strait of Hormuz. Following the strikes, reports from Iranian media confirmed that multiple explosions occurred in several areas, including Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በኢራን ውስጥ ያደረሰውን የአየር ጥቃት የሚያሳይ ምስል ይፋ አድርጓል። ጥቃቶቹ በሆርሙዝ የባህር በር አቅራቢያ የሚገኙ የሚሳኤል መሠረተ ልማቶችን እና የባህር ዳርቻ መከላከያ ስርዓቶችን ያነጣጠሩ ነበሩ። የኢራን መገናኛ ብዙኃን ባወጡት መረጃ በባንዳር አባስ እና በቃሽም ደሴት አካባቢ ፍንዳታዎች እንደተሰሙ አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Waraanni Ameerikaa miidiyaalee irratti vidiyoo haleellaa qilleensa irraa gara biyya Iranitti raawwate ifa godheera. Haleellaan kun kan xiyyeeffate lafa qarqara galaana Hormuz irratti bakka meeshaalee waraanaa fi dhuka'aa gurguddaa fi sirna ittisaa Iranitti ture. Gabaasni miidiyaalee Iran akka ibsutti, haleellaa kanaan booda magaalaalee Bandar Abbas fi qarqara bishaan qarqara Qeshm irratti dhuka'a guddaan dhaga'ameera.

title: US strikes Iran, tanker, as Tehran hits Kuwait, Jordan: What’s the latest
english: The United States military has escalated its campaign against Iran by conducting strikes near Tehran and hitting multiple military assets, including an oil tanker in the Strait of Hormuz. These actions are a direct response to Iran’s earlier attacks on commercial shipping vessels, leading to significant casualties and widespread destruction across several Iranian cities. The intensifying conflict has now spread to regional neighbors, with Iran reportedly targeting US assets in nearby Gulf countries.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በቴህራን አቅራቢያ ጥቃቶችን በመፈጸም እና በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የሚገኝ የነዳጅ መርከብን በማውደም ከኢራን ጋር ያለው ግጭት ተባብሷል። ይህ የአሜሪካ እርምጃ የኢራን የንግድ መርከቦችን የማጥቃት ድርጊት ተከትሎ የመጣ የበቀል እርምጃ ሲሆን በበርካታ የኢራን ከተሞች ከፍተኛ ጉዳት እና ሞት አስከትሏል። ግጭቱ አሁን ወደ ጎረቤት የባህረ ሰላጤ አገሮች እየተዛመተ ሲሆን ኢራንም በአካባቢው የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ንብረቶችን እያጠቃች ነው።
oromo: Waraanni Ameerikaa Teheranitti dhihoo jiru miidhaa geessisuufi bidiruu boba'aa 'Strait of Hormuz' keessa jirtu rukutuun waraana biyyattii waliin qabu daran hammaateera. Tarkaanfiin Ameerikaa kun kan fudhatame bidiruuwwan daldalaa Iran rukutuushee hordofee yoo ta'u, magaalaawwan Iran hedduu keessatti lubbuun namootaa akka darbuu fi miidhaan guddaan akka ga'u taasiseera. Waraanni kun amma gara biyyoota Gulfiitti babal'achaa kan jiru yoo ta'u, Iranis qabeenya waraana Ameerikaa kan naannoo sana jiru rukutuun deebii laachaa jirti.

title: TPLF’s New Proclamation Codifies a Police State
english: The TPLF has introduced a new regional law, Proclamation No. 366/2018, which grants the government extreme powers including warrantless arrests, media censorship, and the use of the death penalty. Critics argue this measure is constitutionally invalid because a regional state lacks the authority to enact laws governing national defense, treason, or capital punishment. Furthermore, the council responsible for this proclamation is viewed as lacking a legitimate political mandate, raising concerns that the law will be used to suppress dissent and violate human rights in Tigray.
amharic: ህወሓት አዲስ የወጣው አዋጅ ቁጥር 366/2018 ያለፍርድ ቤት ትዕዛዝ ማሰርን፣ የመገናኛ ብዙሃን ነፃነትን መገደብንና የሞት ቅጣትን ጨምሮ እጅግ አፋኝ ስልጣናትን ለክልሉ መንግስት ይሰጣል። ይህ ህግ የክልል መንግስት በሀገር አቀፍ የፀጥታ፣ የክህደት እና የሞት ቅጣት ጉዳዮች ላይ የመደንገግ ስልጣን ስለሌለው ህገ-መንግስታዊ መሰረት የለውም ተብሎ ተተችቷል። በተጨማሪም፣ አዋጁን ያወጣው ምክር ቤት ህጋዊ ስልጣን እንደሌለው በመግለጽ፣ ይህ ሰነድ በህዝቡ ላይ ተቃውሞን ለማፈን እና ሰብአዊ መብቶችን ለመጣስ እንደሚውል ስጋት ተፈጥሯል።
oromo: TPLF labsiin lakkoofsa 366/2018 jedhamu kan haaraa baase, mootummaaaf mirga namaa sarbuu fi akka fedhetti hidhuu, miidiyaalee ukkaamsuu fi adabbii du'aa fayyadamuu dabalatee aangoo cimaa kenna. Labsichi mootummaan naannoo tokko dhimmoota ittisa biyyaa, gantuu fi adabbii du'aa irratti seera baasuuf aangoo waan hin qabneef, bu'uura seeraa kan hin qabne ta'uun isaa dubbatameera. Kana malees, qaamni labsicha baase kun aangoo siyaasaa kan hin qabne waan ta'eef, seera kanaan uummata Tigraay irratti dhiibbaa uumuufi mirga namaa sarbuuf itti fayyadamuun isaa sodaachiseera.

title: Ethiopia Cannot Afford Another Disaster
english: The author argues that Ethiopia remains at a critical crossroads, warning that political leaders must prioritize long-term peace over risky maneuvers to avoid a return to the devastating violence seen in Tigray. Despite the Pretoria Agreement, the slow pace of implementation has left citizens in a state of ongoing economic hardship and instability. True stability requires courageous leadership that chooses compromise over fear-mongering to ensure the country does not spiral back into a regional catastrophe.
amharic: ጸሐፊው ኢትዮጵያ በአስቸጋሪ ወቅት ላይ እንደምትገኝ በመግለጽ፣ የፖለቲካ መሪዎች ወደ ቀድሞው አስከፊ ግጭት ላለመመለስ ከስልጣን ጥማት ይልቅ ዘላቂ ሰላምን ቅድሚያ ሊሰጡ እንደሚገባ ያስጠነቅቃሉ። የፕሪቶሪያው የሰላም ስምምነት ቢኖርም፣ አፈጻጸሙ ዘገምተኛ በመሆኑ ዜጎች በኢኮኖሚ እና በማህበራዊ ችግር ውስጥ እንዲቆዩ አድርጓል። ሀገሪቱን ከከፋ ውድቀት ለመታደግ መሪዎች በድፍረት የሰላም አማራጭን በመከተል ለግጭት የሚዳርጉ ድርጊቶችን ማቆም አለባቸው።
oromo: Barreessaan kun Itoophiyaan yeroo muddamaa keessa akka jirtu ibsuun, hogganoonni siyaasaa gara walitti bu'iinsa duraanii deebi'uu dhiisanii nageenyaaf dursaa kennuu akka qaban akeekkachiisa. Waliigalteen Pretooriyaa mallatteeffamus, raawwiin isaa waan hir'ateef lammiileen rakkoo diinagdee fi tasgabbii dhabuu keessa jiru. Biyyi kun gara balaa biraatti akka hin darbineef, hogganoonni sodaa fi wal-shakkii caalaa wal-hubannoo fi nageenya filachuun barbaachisaadha.

title: Washington’s Ethiopia Reset Risks Rewarding Impunity
english: The United States is moving to rebuild diplomatic ties with Ethiopia, prioritizing security and economic partnerships despite the government's history of conflict and human rights concerns. Critics argue that this approach ignores the reality of Ethiopia’s transactional foreign policy and risks legitimizing a regime that prioritizes self-preservation over democracy. By overlooking the systemic issues that led to past wars, Western powers may be failing to hold the government accountable for its actions.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መንግስት በኢትዮጵያ ያለውን የፖለቲካ ቀውስ እና የሰብአዊ መብት ጥሰት ችላ በማለት ከኢትዮጵያ ጋር አዲስ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት ለመመስረት እየጣረ ነው። ተቺዎች እንደሚሉት ይህ አካሄድ የመንግስትን ስልጣን የማቆየት ዓላማ ላይ ያተኮረ የውጭ ግንኙነት ስልት ችላ በማለት፣ ለተጠያቂነት መጥፋት ምክንያት ሊሆን ይችላል። ምዕራባውያን አገራት ለዴሞክራሲያዊ ለውጥ አስፈላጊ የሆኑ መሰረታዊ ማሻሻያዎች ሳይደረጉ አጋርነታቸውን ማሳየታቸው አደገኛ እንደሆነ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa rakkoolee mirga namoomaa fi sababa waraanaatti darbee, hariiroo dippilomaasii Itoophiyaa waliin haaromsuuf carraaqqii gochaa jira. Qeeqqonni akka jedhanitti, tooftaan kun fedhii mootummaan of-ittisuuf qabu kan jajjabeessu fi haqni akka hin mirkanoofne kan taasisu dha. Biyyoonni dhihaa hoggansa Itoophiyaa kan sirreessuu danda'an jijjiirama dhugaa osoo hin gaafatin hariiroo cimsuun isaanii, gaga'ama siyaasaa fi nageenyaa biyyattii irratti dhiibbaa hamaa geessisuu danda'a.

title: Pretoria’s Unfinished Peace Is Fueling Tigray’s New Crisis
english: Concerns are rising that a new conflict could erupt in Ethiopia's Tigray region due to the failure to fully implement the 2022 Pretoria Peace Agreement. Key issues, including the return of displaced people, the status of contested territories, and Tigray's full reintegration into the federal system, remain unresolved. Instead of a stable post-war order, the situation has deteriorated because essential political and administrative reforms were deferred rather than settled.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ በ2022 የተደረሰው የፕሪቶሪያ የሰላም ስምምነት ሙሉ በሙሉ ተግባራዊ ባለመደረጉ በኢትዮጵያ ትግራይ ክልል አዲስ ግጭት ሊቀሰቀስ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት ተፈጥሯል። የተፈናቃዮች መመለስ፣ አወዛጋቢ የሆኑ ግዛቶች ጉዳይ እና የክልሉ ወደ ፌዴራል ስርዓት መመለስ እስካሁን መፍትሄ አላገኙም። እነዚህ መሰረታዊ የፖለቲካ እና የአስተዳደር ጉዳዮች ሳይፈቱ በመቆየታቸው በአካባቢው የነበረው አንጻራዊ ሰላም ወደ መፍረስ ደረጃ ደርሷል።
oromo: waliigalteen nagaa bara 2022 Pretooriyaatti mallatteeffame guutummaatti hojiirra ooluu dhabuun isaa naannoo Tigraayitti waraanni biraa dhalachuu danda'a jedhanii akka sodaatan taasiseera. Rakkooleen gurguddoon akka namoota buqqa'an deebisuu, lafa walitti bu'iinsaa fi Tigraay gara caasaa federaalaatti deebisuu furmaata hin arganne. Rakkooleen siyaasaa fi bulchiinsaa kun furmaata waaraa waan hin argatiniif, haalli naannichaa gara rakkoo hamaatti jijjiiramaa jira.

title: The AU Turned Pretoria Into Abiy’s Shield
english: The 2022 Pretoria Agreement, mediated by the African Union to end the Tigray war, is now criticized for failing to implement promised peace and accountability. Observers argue the AU acted with clear bias toward the Ethiopian government, demonstrated by its dismissive rhetoric and the cancellation of a human rights investigation into mass atrocities. Consequently, critics suggest the agreement served more as a political shield for Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed than as a genuine framework for lasting stability.
amharic: እ.ኤ.አ በ2022 በአፍሪካ ህብረት አደራዳሪነት የተፈረመው የፕሪቶሪያ የሰላም ስምምነት፣ የተገባለትን ቃል ባለመጠበቁ እና ተጠያቂነትን ባለማስፈኑ ትችት እየቀረበበት ይገኛል። የአፍሪካ ህብረት በግጭቱ ወቅት ለኢትዮጵያ መንግስት ወግኗል በሚል የሚነቀፍ ሲሆን፣ በተለይም በትግራይ የተፈጸሙ የሰብአዊ መብት ጥሰቶችን የሚመረምር ኮሚሽንን ስራ በድንገት ማቆሙ በገለልተኛነቱ ላይ ጥያቄ አስነስቷል። ይህ ስምምነት ዘላቂ ሰላምን ከመገንባት ይልቅ፣ ለጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አቢይ አህመድ አስተዳደር እንደ አንድ የፖለቲካ መከላከያ ጋሻ ሆኖ ማገልገሉን ተቺዎች ይገልጻሉ።
oromo: waliigalteen nagaa Pretoria kan bara 2022, kan gamtaa Afrikaan giddu galeessa ta'ee garaa garaa ta'e, waadaa galamee ture kabachiisuu fi gaafatamummaa mirkaneessuun laafina qabaachuu isaa irratti komiin cimaan ka'aa jira. Gamtaan Afrikaa waraana Tigraay keessatti mootummaa Itoophiyaa bira dhaabachuu isaa kan agarsiisan gochoota fi ibsoota fudhatee ture; keessumaa qorannoo yakka waraanaa fi sarbama mirga namoomaa irratti gaggeeffamaa ture tasuma dhaabuun isaa amanamummaa isaatti shakkii fideera. Kanaafuu, waliigalteen kun nagaa waaraa fiduu mannaa, mootummaa Abiy Ahmed ittiin of ittisan meeshaa siyaasaa ta'ee akka tajaajile namoonni hedduun ni dubbatu.

title: Decades In, CCD Keeps the Keys, Sends the Invoices
english: Residents of the Country Club Developers (CCD) gated community in Addis Abeba are frustrated by ongoing demands for extra payments, such as a recent threat to cut off water for those who do not pay 35,000 Birr. Despite buying their homes decades ago, the developer maintains control over the estate and has failed to complete the promised infrastructure and amenities. The core conflict stems from a disagreement over whether the original purchase agreements included finished facilities or if residents are now responsible for funding the remaining construction.
amharic: በአዲስ አበባ ዳርቻ የሚገኘው የካንትሪ ክለብ ዴቨሎፐርስ (CCD) ነዋሪዎች ተጨማሪ ክፍያ እንዲከፍሉ በመጠየቁ ቅሬታቸውን እየገለጹ ነው። ገንቢው ድርጅቱ ከብዙ ዓመታት በፊት መረከብ የነበረባቸውን የጋራ መኖሪያ ቤት አስተዳደር እስካሁን ሳይለቅ፣ የተለያዩ መሰረተ ልማቶችን ባለማሟላቱ ውዝግብ ተፈጥሯል። ነዋሪዎቹ የገዙት የተሟላ ቤት እንደሆነ ቢናገሩም፣ ገንቢው ግን ለቀሪው ግንባታ ተጨማሪ ገንዘብ መጠየቁ ለችግሩ መነሻ ሆኗል።
oromo: Ogeeyyoonni qubannaa mana jireenyaa kan 'Country Club Developers' (CCD) jedhamu, maallaqa dabalataa akka kaffalan dirqisiisuun isaan aarseera. Manneen isaanii waggoota hedduu dura kan bitan ta'us, qindeessaan ijaarsaa kun to'annoo gadi hin lakkifne akkasumas bu'uuraalee misoomaa kakuu gale hin guunne. Falmiin guddaan kunis, bitattoonni manaa ofii isaanii guutummaatti xumurame bitne jedhanii yoo amanann, qindeessaan garuu ijaarsa hafeef kaffaltii dabalataa gaafachaa jiraachuu isaatiin kan dhufeedha.

title: City Levy Lands on Hotels Before the Registers Get Ready
english: The Addis Abeba City Administration has introduced a five percent municipal tax on all hotel stays, effective June 19, 2026, to fund urban infrastructure and services. Hotels are now required to update their payment systems to collect this tax and maintain detailed guest records to ensure compliance. Failure to pay on time will result in financial penalties, and the city has linked the renewal of hotel business licenses directly to their tax payment history.
amharic: የአዲስ አበባ ከተማ አስተዳደር የከተማዋን መሠረተ ልማት እና አገልግሎቶች ለማሻሻል በሚል ከሰኔ 12 ቀን 2018 ዓ.ም ጀምሮ በሆቴል ማረፊያ አገልግሎቶች ላይ የአምስት በመቶ የከተማ ግብር መጣል ጀምሯል። ሆቴሎች ይህንን ግብር ለመሰብሰብ የክፍያ ስርዓታቸውን እንዲያስተካክሉ እና ዝርዝር የደንበኞች መረጃ እንዲይዙ ይጠበቅባቸዋል። የንግድ ፈቃድ እድሳትም ከዚህ የግብር አከፋፈል ጋር የተያያዘ በመሆኑ፣ የግብር ግዴታቸውን ያልተወጡ ሆቴሎች በህግ ተጠያቂ ይሆናሉ።
oromo: Bulchiinsi Magaalaa Finfinnee tajaajila hoteelaa hunda irratti gibira magaalaa dhibbeentaa shan irratti hundaa'e Waxabajjii 12, 2018 irraa eegalee hojiirra oolcheera. Gibirri kun kan ramadame tajaajilaa fi bu'uuraalee misoomaa magaalaa fooyyessuuf yoo ta'u, hoteelonnii sirna kaffaltii isaanii haaromsuudhaan galmee sirrii qabachuuf dirqama qabu. Hayyamni daldalaa hoteelotaa kan itti fufu yoo gibirichi sirnaan kaffalame qofa waan ta'eef, kanneen duubatti hafan irratti adabbiin kan fudhatamu ta'a.

title: Bahir Dar Stadium to Be Ready by September, a Tournament in Mind
english: The Bahir Dar International Stadium is over 90 percent complete and is expected to be fully ready by this September. The final phase focuses on installing imported equipment like lighting and electrical systems to meet updated FIFA and international standards. This major renovation, funded largely by the MIDROC Investment Group, ensures the stadium is now equipped with modern facilities necessary for hosting global football matches.
amharic: የባህር ዳር ዓለም አቀፍ ስታዲየም ግንባታ ከ90 በመቶ በላይ የተጠናቀቀ ሲሆን በዘንድሮው መስከረም ወር ሙሉ ለሙሉ ለአገልግሎት ዝግጁ እንደሚሆን ይጠበቃል። የቀሩት ስራዎች የፊፋን እና የአለም አቀፍ ደረጃዎችን ለማሟላት የሚያስፈልጉ የብርሃን እና የኤሌክትሪክ መሳሪያዎችን መግጠምን ያካትታሉ። በዋናነት በሚድሮክ ኢንቨስትመንት ግሩፕ ድጋፍ እየተከናወነ ያለው ይህ ፕሮጀክት፣ ስታዲየሙ ለዓለም አቀፍ የฟุตบอล ውድድሮች የሚያስፈልጉ ዘመናዊ መገልገያዎችን እንዲያሟላ አድርጎታል።
oromo: Ijaarsi buufata ispoortii idil-addunyaa Bahir Daar dhibbeentaa 90 ol kan xumurame yoo ta'u, ji'a Fulbaana dhufu keessa guutumaatti xumuramee tajaajilaaf qophaa'a jedhamee eegama. Hojiiwwan hafan, sadarkaa FIFA fi idil-addunyaa guutuuf kan gargaaran ibsaa fi meeshaalee elektiriikii biyya alaa irraa dhufan dhaabuu dha. Pirojektiin kun kan deeggarame garee invastimantii Midrookitiin yoo ta'u, buufatichi dorgommiiwwan kubbaa miillaa idil-addunyaa keessummeessuuf meeshaalee barbaachisoo ta'an akka qabaatu taasiseera.

title: Authority Pins Hope on a Coffee Fund as Trees Grow Old
english: The Ethiopian Coffee & Tea Authority is launching a new 'Coffee Fund' to help farmers and exporters manage the financial risks caused by volatile global prices and aging coffee trees. Since nearly 80 percent of the nation's coffee trees are old and less productive, this initiative will act as a form of insurance to provide compensation during market downturns. A technical committee is currently working on the legal frameworks and operational strategies to define how this reserve will be managed and funded.
amharic: የኢትዮጵያ ቡና እና ሻይ ባለስልጣን በአለም አቀፍ የቡና ዋጋ መዋዠቅ እና በቡና እርሻዎች እርጅና ምክንያት ለሚፈጠሩ የገበያ ተግዳሮቶች መፍትሄ የሚሆን የቡና ፈንድ እያቋቋመ ነው። በአሁኑ ወቅት በሀገሪቱ የሚገኙ አብዛኛዎቹ የቡና ዛፎች አርጅተው ምርታማነታቸው የቀነሰ በመሆኑ፣ ይህ ፈንድ ገበያው ሲቀንስ አርሶ አደሮችን እና ላኪዎችን ለመደገፍ እንደ መድን ያገለግላል። ባለስልጣኑ የፈንዱን አሰራር እና አስተዳደር ለመወሰን ከባለድርሻ አካላት ጋር በመሆን የህግ ማዕቀፎችን እና የቴክኒክ ዝግጅቶችን እያከናወነ ይገኛል።
oromo: Abbaan taayitaa Bunaa fi Shayii Itoophiyaa gatiin bunaa addunyaa irratti jijjiiramuu fi muka bunaa dulloomuu irraa kan ka'e rakkoo muudatu hambisuuf 'Qabeenya Bunaa' jedhamu hundaa'uuf jira. Mukni bunaa biyyattii keessaa kutaadhibbeentaa 80 ol dulloomanii waan jiraniif, qabeenyi kun gabaan yeroo gad bu'u qonnaan bultootaa fi ergitoota bunaa gargaaruuf akka inshuraansii tokkootti tajaajila. Abbaan taayitaa kun qabeenya kana akkamitti akka gaggeeffamuufi seera isaa irratti qaamolee dhimmi ilaallatu waliin ta'uun qophiirra jira.

title: Production Soars While the Feed Sellers Go Under
english: Government reports indicate a massive surge in agricultural and poultry production under the 'Bounty of the Basket' initiative. However, small-scale traders and farmers are struggling to survive as the skyrocketing cost of animal feed makes their businesses unsustainable. This creates a contradiction where official statistics show record-breaking output while the people on the ground are forced to exit the industry due to financial pressure.
amharic: የመንግስት መረጃዎች እንደሚያሳዩት በ'ቅርጫቱ በረከት' መርሃ ግብር አማካይነት በግብርና እና በእንቁላል ምርት ላይ ከፍተኛ እድገት ታይቷል። ይሁን እንጂ፣ የእንስሳት መኖ ዋጋ መናር አነስተኛ ነጋዴዎችን እና አርሶ አደሮችን ለኪሳራ እየዳረገ ነው። ይህ ሁኔታ ኦፊሴላዊ መረጃዎች ከፍተኛ ምርት መኖሩን ቢናገሩም፣ በተግባር ግን ብዙ ባለሙያዎች ከገበያ እየወጡ መሆኑን የሚያሳይ አጣብቂኝ ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Gabaasni mootummaa akka agarsiisutti, sagantaa 'Bounty of the Basket' jedhamuun oomishni qonnaa fi hanqaaquu guddaa dabaleera. Haa ta'u malee, gatiin midhaan daakuu (feed) waan mi'aayef, daldaltoonni xixiqqoon fi qonnaan bultoonni hojii isaanii itti fufuu dadhabaniiru. Kunis, ragaaleen mootummaa oomishni guddachuu isaa yoo ibsanillee, namoonni dhuunfaatti hojjetan garuu miidhaa dinagdee kanaan hojii isaanii dhiisuuf dirqamaa akka jiran kan agarsiisuudha.
